title: Meridian Features
description: Lifecycle-aware feature completion tracking. Each feature tracks five implementation sub-states. A feature is only 'done' when all five are true — happy_path alone is not done.

id.description: Slug identifier derived from the feature name (lowercase, hyphens)

name.description: Human-readable feature name from the SPEC.md section heading

source_section.description: The exact SPEC.md heading this feature was seeded from

lifecycle.description: Five sub-states. All must be true for the feature to count as complete.

happy_path.description: Core use case works under normal conditions

integration.description: Works correctly with adjacent features and external systems

edge_cases.description: Handles boundary conditions and unusual inputs

hardening.description: Performance, security, and production-readiness concerns addressed
